scripts.categories:health: node -e "const url=(process.env.API_URL||process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001')+'/categories/health';fetch(url).then(async r=>{if(!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+r.status); console.log(JSON.stringify(await r.json(),null,2));}).catch(err=>{console.error(err);process.exit(1);})"
